stemHtml: An aircraft experiences a radio communication failure while approaching a controlled aerodrome and is unable to establish contact on the appropriate frequency. What is the right course of action?

options.a: Fly by the control tower at 500 ft and rock the wings.
options.b: Fly over the aerodrome at 1000 ft and observe signals from the tower.
options.c: Flash navigation and/or landing lights to attract attention.
options.d: Continue the approach and land if the runway appears clear.
